basis: Exhibit list in TOC (p.8) and Receipts (pp.166-167) list only Exhibits FIN, FA, FDA, CAL. Exhibit ST (p.165) is a state-agency-information list for IL, IN, MI, MN, WA, WI — not a state-addenda exhibit. No dedicated addenda for any state.

rows_marked_subject_to_state_law: q. Non-competition covenants during the term
r. Non-competition covenants after franchise terminated or expires
state_law_references_inline_in_item17.specific_state_overrides_text_found: None. Rows simply carry the marker 'The Franchise Agreement's provision(s) are subject to State Law' without substantive override text.

summary_table.cells: No substantive override text found for any cell. State-law-supersedes language is generic.

recommendation: Prospective franchisees in states with strong franchise relationship laws (WI, MN, IL, MI, IN) should independently confirm that state-law protections (e.g., WI Fair Dealership Act good-cause requirements, MN Franchise Act termination notice and cure periods) override any contrary FA terms, since the FDD does not provide substantive addenda text.
